stops.title: Arrive Chengdu Tianfu Airport
stops.note: Collect luggage, clear customs. Airport is ~45 min from city centre.

stops.title: Waldorf Astoria Chengdu
stops.note: Check in. Take time to settle — long travel day.

stops.title: Taikoo Li evening stroll
stops.note: Open-air lifestyle district adjacent to the Daci Temple. Good for a relaxed first evening walk.

stops.title: Chengdu East → Chongqing
stops.note: G8604. Platform TBC. Chongqing North Station exit — take metro Line 3 to Jiefangbei.

stops.title: Hongya Cave
stops.note: 18-storey stilted building complex over the Jialing River. Best visited before the afternoon crowds.

stops.title: Xiaomian noodles lunch
stops.note: Chongqing's iconic spicy noodle dish. Look for a busy local spot near Jiefangbei.

stops.title: Ciqikou Ancient Town
stops.note: Ming/Qing dynasty heritage street. Antiques, Chongqing snacks, teahouses. Take metro Line 1 → Ciqikou.

stops.title: Regent Chongqing
stops.note: Check in. River view rooms look toward the confluence of the Yangtze and Jialing.
